task_description: Enhance the Magic Video Downloader to support downloading video, MP3, and images from all social media platforms (TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, Pinterest, Threads, Shopee) without watermark. Create both enhanced frontend (index.html) and Cloudflare Worker backend (worker.js).

verification.summary: No build system or tests exist for this static HTML project. Structural validation confirms: all 7 platforms listed, all Cobalt API parameters present in both frontend and worker, picker handling logic for multi-item responses, CORS in worker, format/quality selectors in UI, no-watermark toggle enabled by default, Indonesian language messages throughout.
